headline: Jabil’s Defense Expansion Adds New Dimension To Growth And Risk Profile
summary: Jabil (NYSE:JBL) is expanding further into the defense sector, using its manufacturing, automation, and engineering capabilities to support aerospace and military customers. The company is positioning these technologies to align with global defense spending and modernization programs that are currently creating new contract opportunities. For you as an investor, this move adds another layer to Jabil's profile, which many primarily associate with electronics manufacturing and AI...
